domain: Indonesian pencak silat (UNESCO 2019 ICH martial art): 8 basic techniques (kuda-kuda stance + attitudes + steps + kembangan + buah + jurus + sapuan sweeps + guntingan cuts) + tiered belt-rank grading white/yellow-1/yellow-2/red-3/green-madya/blue-adult + 6 kuda-kuda stance types light/medium/heavy x front/back/middle/side + madya teaching-rights at green-level + grade-by-grade prerequisite-locked syllabus
specific_mechanism: PENCAK-SILAT-GRADE-UNLOCK-CURRICULUM: 6-grade LLM curriculum with capability-test-gated promotion + kuda-kuda foundation invariant + madya self-distillation rights + stance-distribution head gating. (1) 6 explicit grades G_1, ..., G_6 (white/yellow-1/yellow-2/red-3/green-madya/blue-adult). (2) Per grade G_k: training set D_k contains prerequisite-only data; promotion criterion C_k(model) > tau_k unlocks D_{k+1} (gated by capability test). (3) Kuda-kuda foundation: G_1-G_2 trains stance equivalent (basic syntax + entity recognition); kuda-kuda heads held invariant across G_3-G_6 (low-LR lr_stance = lr_full / 100). (4) Per-grade technique-augmentation profile: G_3 adds sweep-style adversarial (sapuan), G_4 adds cut-style negation (guntingan), G_5 adds technique-combination, G_6 free-form. (5) Madya teaching-rights at G_5: model at G_5 serves as teacher for distillation of D_1-D_4 student replays. (6) Stance-distribution attention-head gating: per grade G_k assigns proportion p_light, p_medium, p_heavy of attention heads to small/medium/large context-window roles. (7) Differs from R458 AIKIDO-KATA + R464 ARNIS-STICK + R483 JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM (24-stage cyclical) + R496 GRIOT-HEREDITARY-DISTILL (hereditary multi-teacher) by 6-grade explicit promotion-criterion capability-test gate + kuda-kuda foundation invariant low-LR + madya teaching-rights self-distillation chain + stance-distribution per-grade head gating.
llm_application: PENCAK-SILAT-GRADE-UNLOCK-CURRICULUM 6-grade promotion-criterion C_k(model) > tau_k capability-gated technique unlock + kuda-kuda foundation invariant low-LR stance-head preservation + madya teaching-rights G_5 self-distillation D_1-D_4 student replay chain + stance-distribution per-grade attention-head gating (p_light, p_medium, p_heavy for small/medium/large context). Differs from R407. R410. R432 SONGLINE. R446 OTEA. R458 AIKIDO kata-form. R464 ARNIS stick-cycle (closest — staged drill cycle). R483 JIEQI-24-STAGE (closest — 24-stage cyclical). R496 GRIOT-HEREDITARY (closest — hereditary distillation). Differs from Curriculum Learning Pretraining 2601.21698 + Beyond Random Sampling 2506.11300 + EDCO Dynamic Curriculum + Self-Evolving Curriculum 2505.14970 by 6-grade explicit capability-gate promotion + kuda-kuda foundation invariant + madya self-distillation rights + stance-distribution head gating. Differs by EXPLICIT 6-GRADE PROMOTION GATE + KUDA-KUDA INVARIANT FOUNDATION + MADYA SELF-DISTILL + STANCE-DISTRIBUTION HEAD GATING.
novelty_claim: Curriculum Learning Pretraining + Beyond Random Sampling + EDCO Dynamic + Self-Evolving Curriculum + Self-Distillation literature cover progressive-curriculum + tier-promotion space. PENCAK-SILAT-GRADE-UNLOCK-CURRICULUM adds (a) 6-grade explicit capability-test-gated promotion + (b) kuda-kuda foundation invariant low-LR preservation + (c) madya teaching-rights self-distillation at grade G_5 + (d) stance-distribution attention-head gating per grade. Recombination — borderline lookup.
